profiles.label: Auto
profiles.description: Infer the species from the snapshotted species block when possible; otherwise keep neutral anatomy guidance.

profiles.label: Human
profiles.description: Use grounded human proportions and upright posture for Section 2 views.
profiles.prompt_suffix: Preserve grounded human anatomy seen in the other dataset tiles: upright posture, human limb proportions, balanced shoulders and hips, and no exaggerated fantasy morphology or squat goblin stance.

profiles.label: Goblin
profiles.description: Use squat goblin proportions with a low center of gravity for Section 2 views.
profiles.prompt_suffix: Preserve the same squat goblin proportions seen in the other dataset tiles: slightly hunched posture, bent knees, low center of gravity, broad stance, and short sturdy limbs.
